title: MR FROTH Handheld Milk Frother - Battery-Operated Coffee Frother Wand - Durable & Food-Safe Drink Mixer - Noise-Free, No Shaking - Electric Hand Held Coffee Whisk Frother for Matcha, Milkshake (Pink)
features: POWERFUL & QUICK FROTHER WHISK - This electric milk frother featuring a powerful 19,000 RPM motor will turn your milk into rich, creamy froth in just 15 seconds. Whether you're making lattes, cappuccinos, or hot chocolate, this milk whisk ensures a smooth, velvety texture every time.

VERSATILE ELECTRIC WHISK - This milk frother is handheld for on the go or home use. Equipped with a powerful mini whisk, this hand whisk electric ensures smooth and lump-free drinks. perfect for lattes, cappuccinos, matcha, protein shakes, and mixing baby formula.

EASY TO USE COFFEE FROTHER - This electric milk frother is designed for ultimate ease of use—just press the button to start the milk whisk, and release it when you’ve reached the perfect foam. No complicated settings, just smooth froth in seconds!

DURABLE & LONG LASTING – Crafted from premium ABS and food-grade stainless steel, this handheld milk frother is designed for long-lasting performance and reliability. The sturdy mini whisk ensures smooth operation, making it a dependable electric hand whisk for all your frothing and mixing needs!

EFFORTLESS CLEANING - This matcha whisk & frother is simple to Clean. Just run the frother whisk under hot water and turn it on for an instant rinse! Its compact, battery-powered design (requires 2 AA batteries, not included) fits easily in a drawer or sits neatly alongside your coffee accessories for a clutter-free countertop.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Quiet Function, Lightweight, Cordless, Heavy Duty, Ergonomic Handle
